description: Hello viewers, This is Sulca2099 (you may know me otherwise). I combined a huge amount of work for this website to make it good
title: Welcome
text: Hello, I am Sulca2099 and for my CS exploring class, I decided to make a sequal to my previous website clouds in the sky. This website uses javascript to download small files contaning blogs likethe title, description etc... It uses that data to automatically form this webpage. This means I can write blogs without having to create a new webpage entirly. I am excited to write more blogs in the future if possible. -Sulca2099
